---
title: "testReport"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{testReport}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(STAT6191Ass2)

set.seed(123)

clean_results <- simulate_clean(
  n = 250,
  reps = 1000,
  rate = 1
)

contaminated_results <- simulate_contaminated(
  n = 250,
  reps = 1000,
  contamination_prop = 0.10
)

clean_results
contaminated_results
```

```{r}
#| label: combine
clean_results$setting <- "Clean data"
contaminated_results$setting <- "Contaminated data"

section1_results <- rbind(clean_results, contaminated_results)

section1_results <- section1_results[, c(
  "setting",
  "estimator",
  "mean_estimate",
  "bias",
  "mcsd",
  "mse"
)]

section1_results
```
